scope: packages/ui and packages/app UI surface cartography

subdirectory_barrels: src/context/index.ts → exports helper, data, file, dialog, i18n contexts
src/theme/index.ts → exports DesktopTheme, ThemeProvider, useTheme, 30+ built-in themes

styling_approach.summary: Three-layer styling: Tailwind CSS v4 (utility classes) + CSS custom properties (design tokens) + per-component CSS files (data-attribute selectors)

tailwind.theme_config: packages/ui/src/styles/tailwind/index.css uses @theme directive with CSS variable references
tailwind.no_tailwind_config: No tailwind.config.ts exists in any package — uses CSS-first Tailwind v4 config via @theme blocks

v1_legacy.definition: packages/ui/src/styles/theme.css (610 lines) — dark/light theme variables resolved via CSS custom properties

v2_new.definition: packages/ui/src/v2/styles/ — newer design system, imported via @import "@opencode-ai/ui/v2/styles/tailwind.css"
v2_new.usage: Used in StatusPopoverV2 and other newLayoutDesigns() gated components

color_system.raw_colors: packages/ui/src/styles/colors.css (773 lines) — 12-step gray scale (light + dark), accent color scales, alpha variants
color_system.tailwind_bridge: packages/ui/src/styles/tailwind/colors.css (285 lines) — generated @theme block mapping CSS vars → tailwind color classes
color_system.generated: /* Generated by script/tailwind.ts */ — colors.css is auto-generated from theme.css

typography.sans: var(--font-family-sans): ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif
typography.mono: var(--font-family-mono): ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace

component_css.pattern: Each component (button.tsx) has a corresponding CSS file (button.css) using data-attribute selectors
component_css.mechanism: Components set data-* attributes (data-component, data-variant, data-size, data-slot) in TSX → CSS targets [data-component="button"][data-variant="primary"]
component_css.example_button_css_source: [data-component="button"] { display: inline-flex; ... &[data-variant="primary"] { background-color: var(--button-primary-base); ... } &[data-variant="ghost"] { ... } &[data-variant="secondary"] { ... } &[data-size="small"] { height: 24px; ... } &[data-size="normal"] { height: 28px; ... } &[data-size="large"] { height: 32px; ... } }

app_imports_from_ui.pattern: import { Thing } from "@opencode-ai/ui/thing" (deep subpath, no barrel)

app_local_imports.context_hooks: import { useLanguage } from "@/context/language"; import { useServer } from "@/context/server"; import { useSync } from "@/context/sync"; import { useServers } from "@/context/servers"; import { useSDK } from "@/context/sdk"

solidjs_patterns.consistency: high — strong conventions across all 100+ component files

component_signature.primary_85pct: export function Foo(props: FooProps) { const [local, rest] = splitProps(props, [...]) ... }
component_signature.props_extends: interface FooProps extends ComponentProps<typeof Kobalte>, ParentProps { ... }

kobalte_wrapping.pattern: import { Popover as Kobalte } from "@kobalte/core/popover" — wrap Kobalte primitives in custom components with data-* attributes

reactive_primitives_frequency.createMemo: very high (~900+ app, ~100 ui) — dominates derived state
reactive_primitives_frequency.createSignal: high (~300 app, ~60 ui) — local UI state toggles
reactive_primitives_frequency.createStore: high (~180 app, ~30 ui) — complex/structured state (preferred over multiple signals)
reactive_primitives_frequency.createEffect: moderate (~250 app, ~50 ui) — side effects, scroll, URL sync
reactive_primitives_frequency.createResource: moderate (~40 app, ~5 ui) — async data fetching
reactive_primitives_frequency.onCleanup: low (~30 app, ~5 ui) — paired with timers/listeners
reactive_primitives_frequency.splitProps: moderate (~13 app, ~20 ui) — prop splitting in every component
reactive_primitives_frequency.Dynamic: low (~10 app, ~2 ui) — dynamic component rendering
reactive_primitives_frequency.on(): low (~15 app, ~5 ui) — explicit effect deps

context_pattern.hook_export: export function useX() { const ctx = useContext(XContext); if (!ctx) throw new Error('Missing XProvider'); return ctx }

third_party_solidjs.@kobalte/core: Headless UI primitives (popover, dialog, tabs, dropdown, select, checkbox, switch, radio, collapsible, button, context-menu, accordion)
third_party_solidjs.@tanstack/solid-query: TanStack Query v5 for async data
third_party_solidjs.@solidjs/router: File-based routing (useParams, useNavigate, useLocation, A component)
third_party_solidjs.@solid-primitives/*: 10+ primitives: event-listener, i18n, storage, media, resize-observer, timer, scheduled, scroll, websocket, active-element, audio, event-bus, bounds

key_findings.finding: No index.ts barrel — all UI imports are deep subpath imports via package.json exports map
key_findings.evidence: import { Button } from '@opencode-ai/ui/button' pattern used throughout app

key_findings.finding: Tailwind v4 with no tailwind.config.ts — uses CSS @theme directive and CSS-first configuration
key_findings.evidence: No tailwind.config.* files found in any package

key_findings.finding: Design tokens are CSS custom properties with dual v1/v2 namespaces — v2 is newer design system
key_findings.evidence: v2 tokens imported via @opencode-ai/ui/v2/styles/tailwind.css, used in StatusPopoverV2

key_findings.finding: Components style via data-attribute selectors in companion .css files, not inline or CSS modules
Kobalte is the headless UI foundation — every interactive component wraps Kobalte primitives
key_findings.evidence: import { Popover as Kobalte } from '@kobalte/core/popover' in all interactive components

key_findings.finding: createMemo dominates over createSignal — derived computation is the primary reactive pattern
key_findings.evidence: 5 createMemo calls vs 1 createSignal in just one file; ~900 createMemo usages across app

key_findings.finding: @/* is the only path alias — maps to ./src/*, used for all local imports
